glosses.ja: 知らせ; 新しいこと

sentences.target: Ich habe eine Neuigkeit für dich.

translations.de: Ich habe eine Neuigkeit für dich.
translations.en: I have some news for you.
translations.ru: У меня для тебя есть новость.
translations.vi: Tôi có một tin cho bạn.
translations.uk: У мене для тебе є новина.
translations.hi: मेरे पास तुम्हारे लिए एक खबर है.
translations.nb: Jeg har en nyhet til deg.
translations.sv: Jag har en nyhet till dig.
translations.da: Jeg har en nyhed til dig.
translations.ja: あなたに知らせがあります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present, 1st sg); expresses possession here, agreeing with the subject 'Ich'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Neuigkeit' as the direct object.
Common noun (feminine), accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating recipient/beneficiary.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Es gibt eine Neuigkeit aus der Firma.
sentences.reading: /ɛs gɪpt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ɪçkaɪ̯t aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈfɪʁma./

translations.de: Es gibt eine Neuigkeit aus der Firma.
translations.ipa: /ɛs gɪpt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ɪçkaɪ̯t aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈfɪʁma./
translations.en: There is some news from the company.
translations.fr: Il y a des nouvelles de l'entreprise.
translations.nl: Er is nieuws van het bedrijf.
translations.hi: कंपनी से एक खबर आई है.
translations.ja: 会社から知らせがあります。

tokens.explanation: Expletive (impersonal) pronoun; placeholder subject in the fixed expression 'es gibt'.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg) in the impersonal construction 'es gibt' meaning 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the thing that 'exists' in this construction.
Common noun (feminine), accusative singular; accusative object of 'gibt' (the entity that 'there is').
Preposition governing dative; marks source/origin.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Firma' after 'aus'.
Common noun (feminine), dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Die Neuigkeit macht mich richtig nervös.

translations.de: Die Neuigkeit macht mich richtig nervös.
translations.en: The news makes me really nervous.
translations.es: La noticia me pone muy nervioso.
translations.fr: Cette nouvelle me rend très nerveux.
translations.it: La notizia mi rende davvero nervoso.
translations.pt: A notícia me deixa muito nervoso.
translations.vi: Tin đó làm tôi rất lo lắng.
translations.nl: Dat nieuws maakt me echt nerveus.
translations.hi: यह खबर मुझे सच में बहुत बेचैन कर देती है.
translations.el: Αυτό το νέο με αγχώνει πολύ.
translations.nb: Denne nyheten gjør meg skikkelig nervøs.
translations.sv: Den där nyheten gör mig riktigt nervös.
translations.ro: Vestea asta mă face foarte nervos.
translations.da: Den nyhed gør mig virkelig nervøs.
translations.fi: Tämä uutinen tekee minut tosi hermostuneeksi.
translations.ja: その知らせでとても不安になる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun (feminine), nominative singular; subject of 'macht'.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); causative usage taking an object plus predicative complement.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object (patient) of 'macht'.
Adverb of degree; intensifies the adjective 'nervös'.
Adjective used predicatively; complement indicating the resulting state caused by 'machen'.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin erzählt eine Neuigkeit beim Kaffee.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaxbaʁɪn ɛʁˈtsɛːlt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ɪçkaɪ̯t baɪ̯m kaˈfeː./

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin erzählt eine Neuigkeit beim Kaffee.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaxbaʁɪn ɛʁˈtsɛːlt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ɪçkaɪ̯t baɪ̯m kaˈfeː./
translations.en: Our neighbor is sharing some news over coffee.
translations.es: Nuestra vecina nos cuenta una noticia mentre tomamos café.
translations.fr: Notre voisine partage une nouvelle autour d'un café.
translations.it: La nostra vicina ci racconta una novità davanti a un caffè.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃이 커피 마시면서 소식을 전하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的邻居一边喝咖啡一边分享消息。
translations.yue: 我哋個鄰居一邊飲咖啡一邊講緊消息。
translations.ru: Наша соседка делится новостью за чашкой кофе.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha está contando uma novidade durante o café.
translations.he: השכנה שלנו משתפת אותנו בחדשות על כוס קפה.
translations.tr: Komşumuz kahve içerken bir haber paylaşıyor.
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm của chúng tôi đang chia sẻ một tin khi uống cà phê.
translations.ar: جارتنا تشارك خبراً أثناء شرب القهوة.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw deelt een nieuwtje bij de koffie.
translations.uk: Наша сусідка ділиться новиною за кавою.
translations.hu: A szomszédnőnk kávé mellett megoszt egy hírt.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन कॉफी पर एक खबर बता रही है.
translations.pl: Nasza sąsiadka dzieli się nowiną przy kawie.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας μοιράζεται ένα νέο την ώρα που πίνουμε καφέ.
translations.nb: Naboen vår deler en nyhet over en kopp kaffe.
translations.id: Tetangga kami berbagi kabar saat minum kopi.
translations.sv: Vår granne delar en nyhet över en kopp kaffe.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră ne spune o veste la cafea.
translations.cs: Naše sousedka se u kávy dělí o novinku.
translations.da: Vores nabo deler en nyhed over en kop kaffe.
translations.ja: 近所の人がコーヒーを飲みながら知らせを伝えている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative feminine singular agreeing with 'Nachbarin' (subject).
Common noun (feminine), nominative singular; subject of 'erzählt'.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); denotes reporting/narrating.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Neuigkeit'.
Common noun (feminine), accusative singular; direct object of 'erzählt'.
Contracted preposition 'bei' + article 'dem' (dative); governs dative and indicates the setting/occasion.
Common noun (masculine), dative singular as object of 'beim'; denotes the occasion ('over coffee').
